ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "daily_fluctuation" REAL /* Daily price fluctuation (high price - low price) */,
  "direction" INTEGER /* Direction of the price change (1 for increase, -1 for decrease, 0 for no change) */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of shares traded */,
  "total_shares_traded" INTEGER /* Total number of shares traded (in thousands) */,
  "total_trading_value" TEXT /* Total trading value for the day */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol for the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry the indicator is associated with */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the indicator */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of the data used for calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry the change is associated with */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "current_close" REAL /* Current day's closing price */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Amount of change in closing price */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for dividends and splits */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient if a stock split occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry the volume is associated with */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "volume_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "average_volume" INTEGER /* Average trading volume over a specified period */,
  "volumeatility" REAL /* Measure of volume volatility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry the alert is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price threshold, volume spike) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the alert has been acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)
